ns0:entry.ns0:title: AceDataCloud/Nexior
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AceDataCloud/Nexior
Language: vue
Consumer AI app for chat, image generation, video generation, and music creation powered by Ace Data Cloud APIs.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: AutomaApp/automa
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AutomaApp/automa
Language: vue
A browser extension for automating your browser by connecting blocks

ns0:entry.ns0:title: CorentinTh/it-tools
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CorentinTh/it-tools
Language: vue
Collection of handy online tools for developers, with great UX.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Daymychen/art-design-pro
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Daymychen/art-design-pro
Language: vue
A Vue 3 admin dashboard template using Vite + TypeScript + Element Plus | vue3 admin | vue-admin — focused on user experience and visual design.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Virtual-Browser/VirtualBrowser
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Virtual-Browser/VirtualBrowser
Language: vue
Free anti fingerprint browser, 指纹浏览器, 隐私浏览器, 防识别浏览器, 反识别浏览器, 防关联浏览器, 免费的web3空投专用指纹浏览器 https://virtualbrowser.cc/?src=github

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Yin-Hongwei/music-website
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Yin-Hongwei/music-website
Language: vue
🎧 Vue + SpringBoot + MyBatis 音乐网站

ns0:entry.ns0:title: aleksey-hoffman/sigma-file-manager
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aleksey-hoffman/sigma-file-manager
Language: vue
"Sigma File Manager" is a free, open-source, quickly evolving, modern file manager (explorer / browser) app for Windows and Linux.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: asadahimeka/pixiv-viewer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/asadahimeka/pixiv-viewer
Language: vue
Yet Another Pixiv Illust&Novel Viewer. 又一个 Pixiv 阅览工具，提供 pixiv 的插画、动图、漫画和小说等作品的在线浏览，适配多端样式，提供多种浏览布局选择，支持 PWA 安装，支持自定义 API 与图床，支持 RefreshToken/OAuth/Cookie 方式登录。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jihe520/MathModelAgent
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jihe520/MathModelAgent
Language: vue
🤖📐专为数学建模设计的 Agent ,自动完成数学建模，生成一份完整的可以直接提交的论文。 An Agent Designed for Mathematical Modeling ,Automatically complete mathmodel and generate a complete paper ready for submission.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: unovue/reka-ui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/unovue/reka-ui
Language: vue
An open-source UI component library for building high-quality, accessible design systems and web apps for Vue. Previously Radix Vue

ns0:entry.ns0:title: vbenjs/vue-vben-admin
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/vbenjs/vue-vben-admin
Language: vue
A modern vue admin panel built with Vue3, Shadcn UI, Vite, TypeScript, and Monorepo. It's fast!
